title: ModelAttribution
description: Payload of the <!-- structured:model-attribution --> comment upserted onto a Task ticket at the moment it transitions to agent::executing (Story #2813). One entry per Task. Story- and Epic-level breakdowns are derived at query time from the child Tasks' attribution comments — there is no Story/Epic-scope emission.

ticketId.description: GitHub Issue number of the Task this attribution is recorded on.

id.description: Canonical model identifier (e.g. 'claude-opus-4-7', 'claude-sonnet-4-6'), or the sentinel 'unknown' when neither SDK metadata nor a runtime env var supplied an identity.

family.description: Coarse model family label for rollup grouping (e.g. 'Opus', 'Sonnet', 'Haiku'). Optional; derived from the id when present.

source.description: Provenance of the model identification, in fallback order: 'sdk-metadata' (resolved from the SDK response), 'env' (resolved from a runtime env var), 'unknown' (neither was available).

recordedAt.description: ISO-8601 timestamp at which the attribution was recorded.

sdkMetadata.description: Opaque pass-through fields lifted from the SDK response metadata when available (e.g. response id, usage hints). Never required; never relied upon by the rollup helper.
